canonical_name: the guests streaming out of the hall
some elderly chaperone who went about at night looking to see who slept in whose bed
no other woman on this earth-
one whom Arthur loves and cannot have
this child was conceived in your marriage bed, and none of us
your marriage bed, and none of us
people well into their middle years who had known no other king
such women as did not think very much or talk very intelligently
pretty women with little of sense
a babe of four or five
the handsomest man she had seen in many a long year
the only person alive who had real influence with Gwydion
no one alive to whose counsel Gwydion would listen
a fool full of his own importance
all the men in the kingdom
the only person in this household with whom she spoke from time to time as one adult to another
